enabled.description: Force-enable or force-disable prompt compression fleet-wide. When set by policy, users cannot override it.

autoCompressPaste.description: Force clipboard auto-compression on paste. When set by policy, users cannot override it.

threshold.description: Minimum estimated token count before compression kicks in.

gatewayBaseUrl.description: The organization's lean-ctx gateway endpoint (e.g. https://ai-gateway.example.com). Shown to users for configuring base-URL-capable tools (Claude Code CLI, Cursor, IDE API clients). The extension itself cannot re-route first-party web-chat traffic.
